REPLY: 



While I hasten to point out that as a Minister I do not conduct investigations, I have been advised that the matter is currently under investigation by DPCI. Mr Manyele was one of the eight South African citizens who were killed on 14 June 1985 in Gaborone, Botswana. DPCI has invited that all information on the matter be communicated to DPCI. Mr Pambo is requested to contact DPCI.
